translations.vi: Nước ép này là tự nhiên.
translations.ja: このジュースは天然です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying 'jugo'; agrees in gender and number with the noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase.
Copular verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject and predicate adjective.

sentences.target: La luz natural entra por la ventana.
sentences.reading: /la luz natuˈɾal ˈentɾa poɾ la βenˈtana/

translations.es: La luz natural entra por la ventana.
translations.ipa: /la luz natuˈɾal ˈentɾa poɾ la βenˈtana/
translations.en: Natural light comes in through the window.
translations.fr: La lumière naturelle entre par la fenêtre.
translations.de: Natürliches Licht kommt durch das Fenster herein.
translations.it: La luce naturale entra dalla finestra.
translations.pt: A luz natural entra pela janela.
translations.vi: Ánh sáng tự nhiên đi vào qua cửa sổ.
translations.nl: Natuurlijk licht komt door het raam naar binnen.
translations.hu: A természetes fény beárad az ablakon.
translations.hi: प्राकृतिक रोशनी खिड़की से अंदर आती है।
translations.el: Το φυσικό φως μπαίνει από το παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Naturlig lys kommer inn gjennom vinduet.
translations.sv: Naturligt ljus kommer in genom fönstret.
translations.da: Naturligt lys kommer ind gennem vinduet.
translations.ja: 自然光が窓から入ってきます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the noun phrase 'luz'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Attributive adjective modifying 'luz'; agrees with the noun in number and typically remains invariable in form.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the clause.
Adposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'por la ventana'.
Definite article modifying 'ventana'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'por'.

sentences.target: Quiero un color natural para la sala.
sentences.reading: /ˈkjeɾo un koˈloɾ natuˈɾal ˈpaɾa la ˈsala/

translations.es: Quiero un color natural para la sala.
translations.ipa: /ˈkjeɾo un koˈloɾ natuˈɾal ˈpaɾa la ˈsala/
translations.en: I want a natural color for the living room.
translations.fr: Je veux une couleur naturelle pour le salon.
translations.de: Ich möchte eine natürliche Farbe für das Wohnzimmer.
translations.it: Voglio un colore naturale per il soggiorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想给客厅选一种自然的颜色。
translations.yue: 我想揀一種自然嘅顏色畀客廳。
translations.ru: Я хочу естественный цвет для гостиной.
translations.pt: Quero uma cor natural para a sala.
translations.tr: Oturma odası için doğal bir renk istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn một màu tự nhiên cho phòng khách.
translations.nl: Ik wil een natuurlijke kleur voor de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Я хочу природний колір для вітальні.
translations.hi: मैं बैठक के लिए एक प्राकृतिक रंग चाहता हूँ।
translations.el: Θέλω ένα φυσικό χρώμα για το σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ha en naturlig farge til stuen.
translations.id: Saya ingin warna alami untuk ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Jag vill ha en naturlig färg till vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Vreau o culoare naturală pentru sufragerie.
translations.da: Jeg vil have en naturlig farve til stuen.
translations.ja: リビングには自然な色がほしいです。

tokens.explanation: Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses desire and takes a direct object.
Indefinite article introducing the noun phrase 'color'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Attributive adjective modifying 'color'; agrees in number and, here, functions as a postnominal modifier.
Adposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary phrase 'para la sala'.
Definite article modifying 'sala'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'para'.

sentences.target: Habla de forma natural con tus amigos.
sentences.reading: /ˈaβla ðe ˈfoɾma natuˈɾal kon tus aˈmiɣos/

translations.es: Habla de forma natural con tus amigos.
translations.ipa: /ˈaβla ðe ˈfoɾma natuˈɾal kon tus aˈmiɣos/
translations.it: Parla in modo naturale con i tuoi amici.
translations.he: דבר באופן טבעי עם החברים שלך.
translations.vi: Hãy nói chuyện tự nhiên với bạn bè của bạn.
translations.hi: अपने दोस्तों से स्वाभाविक रूप से बात करो।
translations.el: Μίλησε φυσικά με τους φίλους σου.
translations.ja: 友達とは自然に話してください。

tokens.explanation: Main verb, present indicative or imperative form; here used as the predicate of the clause.
Adposition introducing the complement 'forma natural'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the prepositional phrase after 'de'.
Adjective modifying 'forma'; part of the noun phrase 'forma natural'.
Adposition introducing the accompaniment/comitative phrase 'con tus amigos'.
Possessive determiner modifying 'amigos'; second person plural possessive form.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'con'.
